title: Domain
description: A scanned vault domain as emitted by `prevail domains --json`. Mirrors the `Domain` interface in src/vault.ts. A directory is a domain iff it contains state.md.

path.description: Absolute path to the skill's SKILL.md.
Absolute path to the domain directory.

hasState.description: Always true for an emitted Domain — the defining property of a domain is that state.md exists.

openLoopCount.description: Count of unchecked open items (state.md Open Items section, else open-loops.md checkboxes).

stateMtime.description: state.md modification time in epoch milliseconds, or null if unreadable.

skills.description: Skills discovered under skills/<name>/SKILL.md, ordered by the cadence rank in vault.ts.
